_comment: Hand-authored annotations merged onto the raw schema dump by scripts/load-c360-dictionary.mjs. Everything here is PHI-free METADATA (descriptions, classifications, relationships) — never client data. Keys under 'tables' are 'SCHEMA.TABLE' exactly as they appear in the dump. Column 'classification' is one of: PHI | quasi-identifier | safe | unclassified. Mark every identifier so the C2 aggregation step de-identifies correctly.

dbo.Client.description: Master client record — one row per enrolled individual.

glossary.definition: Count of clients with AdmissionDate set and DischargeDate null as of a date.
Days between AdmissionDate and DischargeDate (or today if active).

metrics.name: census_by_program
metrics.definition: Active client count grouped by program.
metrics.sqlHint: COUNT(*) FROM dbo.Client WHERE DischargeDate IS NULL GROUP BY ProgramId
